name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Fwd: Jon's opponent is deceiving voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The integrity of our government is at stake. |
---
Hey friend,

I wanted to bump this email from my team -- it's important everyone understands exactly who we're up against.

**It's pretty simple: David Perdue will vote with his donors in the insurance industry to end health care protections for Georgians who are fighting for their lives, then lie in public about it.**

Senator Perdue is totally blinded by corruption and corporate influence. And he's such a creature of the Washington swamp, he'll lie shamelessly about what he's done.

Fighting corruption is literally my job. My business has exposed bribery, the abuse of power, war crimes, and organized crime around the world.

**_And friend, my opponent's shameless lies and corruption must end._**

**[If you can, please make a contribution to support my campaign today>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b4/3144894115/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

This is about human rights and human dignity. This is about whether the interests of the public prevail over the interests of well-lobbied insurance companies that put their bottom line over human lives.

What matters more? **[I need your support to fight for the people.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b4/3144894115/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k")**

Jon

Sent from my iPhone

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Perdue Files | Jon Ossoff HQ
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 5, 2020
**Subject:** Jon's opponent is deceiving voters

Friend,

**Sen. David Perdue is trying to deceive Georgia voters in his ads.**

In his latest ad, Perdue said health insurance should cover pre-existing conditions -- even though he has voted MULTIPLE TIMES against ensuring protections for the **_1.8 million_** Georgians with pre-existing conditions, and supports a lawsuit that could kick nearly **_500,000_** Georgians off their health care.

David Perdue is getting desperate -- because he knows he is going to lose.

He has to deceive his constituents, because his record is indefensible. **_He puts lobbyists and donors first, and his constituents last!_**

The people of Georgia deserve a leader like Jon Ossoff who they can trust to protect and strengthen their health care -- not someone who has to lie about his record to win votes.

**[Friend, can you make a donation to power Jon to victory and send a fighter for health care to the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b4/3144894115/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b7/3144894115/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k_ex_10")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b6/3144894115/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k_ex_20")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b9/3144894115/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k_ex_50")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352b8/3144894115/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352bb/3144894115/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k_ex_other")
---

David Perdue enables the corruption in Washington.

_He has taken nearly $300,000 from health industry PACs (!!!), all while voting in their favor._

_And he isn't the only one._

In 2019, the pharmaceutical and health products industry alone employed 1,471 lobbyists -- **that's nearly three lobbyists per member of Congress!**

**_Friend, corporate lobbyists have too much influence over politicians from both parties -- our elected officials should be serving the people!_**

_This widespread corruption needs to end!_

And Jon is determined to clean up Washington!

He will ban corporate political donations and secret corporate money in politics. He is the anti-corruption crusader that Georgians and Americans need.

**[Friend, can you pitch in $20 to send Jon to Washington and elect a leader who will put the people first and ensure everyone's access to affordable health care?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352ba/3144894115/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k&amount=20")**

| [DONATE $20 >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e294c/5b2c1286/3932c634/25f352ba/3144894115/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k?refcode=em_2020_09_10_health_lying_k&amount=20")
---

Thanks for all you do,

Team Ossoff

name: Tom Cotton
subject: We Need Mark Ronchetti To Stand Up Against the Liberal Mob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
It’s Tom Cotton, U.S. Senator for Arkansas. I am proud to endorse and stand with Mark Ronchetti for the New Mexico U.S. Senate seat. We need strong leaders who stand for conservative values against the attacks from the Left, and Mark will do just that. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

It’s Tom Cotton, U.S. Senator for Arkansas. I am proud to endorse and stand with Mark Ronchetti for the New Mexico U.S. Senate seat. We need strong leaders who stand for conservative values against the attacks from the Left, and Mark will do just that.

Mark, a former meteorologist who was on T.V. for almost 20 years, has built a bond with the voters of New Mexico and he can turn New Mexico RED! Mark will protect the Second Amendment, he will DEFEND our police and law enforcement, and he will fight for the unborn. I need Mark in the U.S. Senate to fight with me against China and the radical left.

Mark’s opponent is a puppet for Nancy Pelosi who supports the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and defunding the police. And if Mark can pickup this seat, we are guaranteed to hold the Senate.
[Click Here to Support Mark Ronchetti and Republican Majority] http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

[Click Here to Contribute $10] http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

[Click Here to Contribute $20] http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

[Click Here to Contribute $50] http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Mark is one of our best chances of going on offense and picking up a seat from the Democrats. He has a winning message and, frankly, is just a better candidate than the career-politician Pelosi clone Mark is running against.

That’s why Pelosi and Schumer are spending big dollars to beat Mark. If we can help Mark get his message out, he can win. And because Mark is such a better candidate who is standing up for law and order against the violent mob, he doesn’t need much to do it.

Please consider supporting Mark by chipping in even just $5, $10, or $15 to protect the Republican majority from the far-left machine.

Thank you, and I hope you can join me in supporting Mark Ronchetti, In Service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Mjc3OTcS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDkxNDY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

P.S. I need Mark in Washington to protect President Trump's Republican majority against the radical far Left.

Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

name: Corky Messner
subject: A Day of Remembrance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/09aa5662887fa700/8eefaba76794a244c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Today is Patriot Day 2020 - a day of remembrance, reflection, and respect.

On September 11th, 2001 our country lost 2,753 souls at the World Trade Center, and more than 6,000 people were injured.

The events of that morning still echo through history, and the pain caused by Islamic extremists hasn't gone away.

But as Americans, we persevere. Every day that we wake up, put our shoes on, and go to work, we prove that we as a country are resilient.

In the days following the terrorist attacks, we came together as a country. We united, and we collectively worked towards rebuilding.

In many ways, we are still rebuilding. But thanks to the perseverance and strength of the American worker, our liberty, and our freedom, we are building a better and a stronger America every day.

We must be always vigilant, and stand united as Americans to ensure our country remains a beacon of strength and hope around the world.

Corky Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/09aa5662887fa700/4afee6974407c565c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/09aa5662887fa700/673d8f6f9ad95698c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Kevin Hern
subject: 19 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Americans showed their best after we saw the worst. Read more >>
Peter, 19 years ago today, Americans watched in horror as nearly three thousand innocent people lost their lives in the deadliest attack on U.S. soil since Pearl Harbor.
In the aftermath we vowed that we would never forget, and I hope we never do.
Let us remember those brave men and women who have fought and died for our freedom.
Let us remember the resilience we showed as a nation on September 11, 2001 and beyond.
Let us remember that Americans have the strength to get through anything, and that we are still the greatest nation in the world.
Nothing can change the fact that when America is tested, we come together in unity. And every single time we’ve come out better on the other side.
Americans are strong, we’re tough, and, in the end, we stick together.
Respectfully,

clean_body: Americans showed their best after we saw the worst. Read more >> Peter, 19 years ago today, Americans watched in horror as nearly three thousand innocent people lost their lives in the deadliest attack on U.S. soil since Pearl Harbor. In the aftermath we vowed that we would never forget, and I hope we never do. Let us remember those brave men and women who have fought and died for our freedom. Let us remember the resilience we showed as a nation on September 11, 2001 and beyond. Let us remember that Americans have the strength to get through anything, and that we are still the greatest nation in the world. Nothing can change the fact that when America is tested, we come together in unity. And every single time we’ve come out better on the other side. Americans are strong, we’re tough, and, in the end, we stick together. Respectfully, Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Let us never forget
body:
Today is a somber day in America.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Today, we pause to remember all those that we lost in the tragic attacks on our Country on September 11, 2001.
We lost mothers, fathers, husbands, wives, grandparents and countless selfless heroes. That day we saw the worst of humanity and the evil that terrorism brought to our doorstep. But that same day, we saw the best of humanity. Americans from all walks of life came together rescuing victims, caring for those injured, and supporting one another.
In the days that followed those horrific and cowardly attacks, we saw the American people rise in the face of evil. So today while we reflect on that terrible tragedy, remember that we as Americans can overcome and will overcome anything. Because we are all Americans.
---
|
---
| Let us never forget the brave men and women we lost that morning, the hundreds of first responders that are still battling injuries and illnesses from that day, and the families that are mourning today.
Please, take a moment and join me in this prayer:
Today I pray that we will lift up the Americans we lost on September 11th, 2001 and the families who are still struggling today - and everyday. May God's grace be with them. Please Lord, heal our nation and help our leaders guide our great country back towards our founding principles.
God bless you, and God bless America.
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Republican Nominee for Congress, FL-03
---
|
---

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Like so many of you, I will never forget where I was when I found out that America had been attacked on September 11, 2001.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19108714/249755297/-1191128446?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200911Remembrance_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBjZDY5OS00Y2Y0LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQRR88h5IpbDkRQSZyBzrsk4B6fdgmFfeAPgzeC1mlM=)
| | Friends, Like so many of you, I will never forget where I was when I found out that America had been attacked on September 11, 2001. I was on board a naval vessel in the Black Sea, deployed with the 24th Marine Expeditionary Unit. A crewmate woke me up after a long night on radio watch duty, and we all turned to our tiny TV in the berthing and watched the towers fall. At that moment we didn’t know what the future held for us, but we knew that if we stuck together and stood face front in a unified manner, we could overcome any obstacle. I know and believe that is still true today. Together, we can conquer the coronavirus. We can conquer the systemic problems in our country. And most of all, I know that we can move forward together to a better tomorrow — just like we knew back then. This morning, I joined a wreath-laying ceremony in Lexington, to remember and honor those lost: |
---
Today, I hope everyone remembers the sacrifices made by first responders, the loss felt by our country and the families of the victims, and the drawing together of our country in resolve to prove that no matter our differences, in times of crisis America pulls together.
Thank you,
Josh

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19108715/249755300/-1082575601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBjZDY5OS00Y2Y0LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQRR88h5IpbDkRQSZyBzrsk4B6fdgmFfeAPgzeC1mlM=&emci=fa4a8c68-42f4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=e90cd699-4cf4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19108716/249755301/209776233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBjZDY5OS00Y2Y0LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQRR88h5IpbDkRQSZyBzrsk4B6fdgmFfeAPgzeC1mlM=&emci=fa4a8c68-42f4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=e90cd699-4cf4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: A personal note on 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Nineteen years ago today, our lives were changed forever when our nation suffered a horrific terror attack unlike any we had ever seen. We all felt, and continue to feel, the insurmountable grief of that day -- grief that rippled through and touched every corner of our country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19108838/249760253/1960319551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDZjMzY5Yi00ZWY0LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L6OFPuhd08_D1y8zHLPX6lQ3vPLObEaACxf7xoWufsc=&emci=01d2e607-33f4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=b46c369b-4ef4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) Friend,

Nineteen years ago today, our lives were changed forever when our nation suffered a horrific terror attack unlike any we had ever seen. We all felt, and continue to feel, the insurmountable grief of that day -- grief that rippled through and touched every corner of our country.

On this anniversary of those attacks, we honor the memories and sacrifice of those we lost that day, from Ground Zero to the Pentagon to right here in Pennsylvania, as well as reflect on the incredible bravery of our first responders and our servicemembers.

Friend, in the face of terror, Americans from all walks of life came together and moved forward in unity. In the midst of a new, albeit different, set of challenges, I am hopeful that we can once again come together to face what lies ahead.

As we look towards the future, we can never forget the lives lost on September 11th, and we must commit to honoring their sacrifice by remaining vigilant so that no such tragedy ever takes place again.

God bless the United States of America,

Eugene | __Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit [EugeneForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19108839/249760254/1960319551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDZjMzY5Yi00ZWY0LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L6OFPuhd08_D1y8zHLPX6lQ3vPLObEaACxf7xoWufsc=&emci=01d2e607-33f4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=b46c369b-4ef4-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249). name: MJ Hegar
subject: 19 years ago, we rose to the occasion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Today, we need to rise once again.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f6d/7f51f7bc/429786e7/4efa2607/704938311/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

As a young lieutenant in the Air Force, I watched in horror as the September 11th attacks unfolded in real time on the news. Seeing thousands of Americans killed, I wondered: why is this happening?

The attack on our country was a wake-up call for me and many of my fellow soldiers. I was at a transformative age; things that were once black and white were suddenly grey. Those of us who wore the uniform would soon confront missions in Iraq and Afghanistan. It was our duty and we took up the call to serve. We fulfilled our oaths to our country.

My oath -- to support and defend our Constitution -- guided me then and guides me still today. I promised to defend against threats both foreign and domestic, and I've been outraged watching elected leaders violate their oaths of office by putting politics over country again and again.

Back then I also learned the importance of allies, and how critical it is to stay true to the promises we make to them. In the past few years, our leadership has failed to make good on our word, and in doing so has put our national security and the next generation putting on the uniform at risk. We must do better by our troops.

We owe it to those who wear the uniform to ensure that we hand down the most stable foreign policy environment possible to the next generation of service members. While there truly are some things worth fighting for, those who take the oath of office -- regardless of politics or party -- must prioritize diplomacy and make foreign policy decisions with the understanding of the terrible cost of war.

Almost twenty years after 9/11, our country faces new and different, but equally pressing, crises. In so many ways, our leaders have failed us. But, as we witnessed in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks, we can and must come together to help and protect one another.

On this sorrowful anniversary, may we pause to remember those we lost in the horrific attacks on our country. May we also acknowledge all we have to do to overcome the challenges we face, and be reminded of our capacity to do so. There is no cavalry coming to save us. We are the calvary, and we must rise to the occasion once again. \-- MJ Hegar
---

|
---

clean_body: Today, we need to rise once again. | "" | | Peter, As a young lieutenant in the Air Force, I watched in horror as the September 11th attacks unfolded in real time on the news. Seeing thousands of Americans killed, I wondered: why is this happening? The attack on our country was a wake-up call for me and many of my fellow soldiers. I was at a transformative age; things that were once black and white were suddenly grey. Those of us who wore the uniform would soon confront missions in Iraq and Afghanistan. It was our duty and we took up the call to serve. We fulfilled our oaths to our country. My oath -- to support and defend our Constitution -- guided me then and guides me still today. I promised to defend against threats both foreign and domestic, and I've been outraged watching elected leaders violate their oaths of office by putting politics over country again and again. Back then I also learned the importance of allies, and how critical it is to stay true to the promises we make to them. In the past few years, our leadership has failed to make good on our word, and in doing so has put our national security and the next generation putting on the uniform at risk. We must do better by our troops. We owe it to those who wear the uniform to ensure that we hand down the most stable foreign policy environment possible to the next generation of service members. While there truly are some things worth fighting for, those who take the oath of office -- regardless of politics or party -- must prioritize diplomacy and make foreign policy decisions with the understanding of the terrible cost of war. Almost twenty years after 9/11, our country faces new and different, but equally pressing, crises. In so many ways, our leaders have failed us. But, as we witnessed in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks, we can and must come together to help and protect one another. On this sorrowful anniversary, may we pause to remember those we lost in the horrific attacks on our country. May we also acknowledge all we have to do to overcome the challenges we face, and be reminded of our capacity to do so. There is no cavalry coming to save us. We are the calvary, and we must rise to the occasion once again. \-- MJ Hegar | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. subject: This is sick, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
A threat against sitting Members of Congress? |
---
Friend -- You remember Marjorie Taylor Green, the extremist, racist conspiracy theorist running for Congress in Georgia?

She posted a threatening photo on Facebook last week showing her holding an AR-15 next to images of three sitting members of Congress (who all just happen to be women of color).

_This is sick, friend._

This is someone Donald Trump has called a future star of the Republican Party -- someone who in all likelihood will win her general election and be sworn into the U.S. House in January.

She is targeting sitting legislators.

**Politicians who traffic in this extremism need to be defeated by such a margin that they never run for office again.**

**[Chip in $10 to my Senate campaign in Georgia to bring decent, unifying leadership to Washington -- leadership that rejects the hateful politics of Donald Trump and the politicians who enable him.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2944/5b2c1286/39344a1e/25f35110/514798192/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_11_mtg_moc?refcode=em_2020_09_11_mtg_moc&amount=10")**

Friend, where is my opponent? Shouldn't David Perdue have something to say about this extremist candidate, who is now the face of his party in Georgia?

**David Perdue takes no responsibility for anything. Not his own campaign's anti-Semitism, nor threatening imagery from one of his own party's Congressional nominees in Georgia.**

He refused to condemn Donald Trump for disparaging American prisoners of war.

He had no apology for the Jewish community after running an anti-Semitic digital attack ad against me.

**Friend, I promise you, in the Senate I will stand up for decency, compassion, and tolerance.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Did you hear what Trump did this time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb70162f23d1/did-you-hear-what-trump-did-this-time?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
It’s been all over the news, so I am sure you heard that Trump is on tape admitting that he has been downplaying the COVID-19 pandemic despite knowing how bad the virus would be. In fact, we know that his National Security Advisor said to him **way back in January** that this pandemic would be the hardest thing he would face in his entire presidency. Yet he lied, and nearly 200,00 Americans have died. My opponent, meanwhile, has been a stark defender of Trump throughout the pandemic. He has been pushing the misleading narrative that “China hid the virus,” all while it was Trump who hid the severity of it. [Click here to help us unseat a dishonest, pro-Trump Republican.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c16554f065&e=140a9b81e7) President Trump knew in February how critical it was to take action regarding the coronavirus, expressed knowledge of how the coronavirus spread, and an understanding of the risk to American people. His lack of action was not ignorance - it was deliberate. The President of the United States of America deliberately withheld information from the people of this country, resulting in **5.5M people losing their health insurance, 20M losing their jobs, and nearly 200,000 people of this country losing their lives. More than 100,000 small businesses have closed permanently.** The economic depression faced by the working families of this country rests squarely at the feet of this President. And where is my opponent, Adam Kinzinger? He is nowhere to be seen. Adam Kinzinger’s silence is complicity in that cover-up. The people of IL-16 are hungry. **Our unemployment rate remains higher than the national average.** When derecho storms swept through the district weeks ago, Kinzinger was silent. He’s been silent about conflicts between activists and police in the district, silent about hospital closures in the district, silent about his decision to vote against emergency funding for the USPS, near-silent about Russian bounties on American troops’ heads, and, now, he is silent about the President’s inexcusable inaction regarding the pandemic. The United States deserves so much better. IL-16 deserves so much better.

He continues to fail us as a representative and continues to prop up the failing Trump administration, with which he votes 93% of the time. **This November, we must remove Trumpism at the root, and that starts with Trump’s enablers in Congress.** [I hope I can count on you to chip in and help me with this mission.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2124f049ff&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Rita Hart
subject: Bringing people together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ltOHNfyYu4CAM7zvy39WYxu-EOd1T6a6ewu2gQAqum0=/YuC4uYvnvHfcbUslC8-764rYS-odHG4OSI_1_sE82EI=) I remember where I was on September 11th, 2001. I'm sure you do, too. And despite how much has changed since then, one thing remains the same -- that the American people come together and put aside their differences in times of need. My heart still breaks for all the families of the victims and all the brave first responders who risked their lives for our country. My thoughts and prayers are with them today. Today also reminds me that we're stronger than any force that tries to tear us apart. We're stronger than we imagine when we stand together, united as a nation. That's why I'm proud to be running for Congress -- because I've seen how powerful it is when our communities come together to support one another. I'll be spending some time today in reflection, thinking about what's changed -- and what hasn't -- in the past 19 years. Wishing your family a peaceful day, Rita Hart | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: We will NEVER FORGET, the Peacetime President, and Beware of Biden/Harris
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20255-c433db87b4634192b7cb80515c1302d4/75/715/d88772ed-bd70-4345-9932-847e12a8a970)** Today, our nation came together to remember those that lost their lives on September 11th, 2001. Each year we pledge to never forget the nearly 3,000 innocent Americans who lost their lives during the attacks. From those on-board the four airplanes, to the first responders rushing in to save as many innocent people as they could, to those still dealing with the after-effects of the attack today -- we promise, as a nation, that we will never forget what happened on that day. The deadly attacks on innocent civilians showed us the worst that humanity has to offer, but in the aftermath a clear picture was painted of what makes America the greatest nation on earth. Americans of all races, religions and creeds came together with the common goals of helping those affected by the horrible tragedy and holding the terrorist organizations responsible accountable. Proving to all of those who wish to do us harm, when you knock us down, we will get back up and we will fight back with a vengeance. To those who lost their lives, we will never forget you. To those who lost loved ones, we continue to stand with you. To those who are still struggling, you are not alone. We will NEVER FORGET. | |
---

Falsely claiming that, according to “anonymous sources,” he had shown disrespect and contempt for those that serve our country honorably.

They even went so far as to exploit the injury, pain and suffering of some of our brave service members, asking what the President would say to them...

Democrats absolutely lost their minds earlier this week (as if they hadn’t already...) when President Donald J. Trump was officially nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize.

Despite having cheered on former-President Barack Obama receiving one for doing absolutely nothing, Democrats refuse to admit that President Trump is certainly deserving of the prize for the numerous historic peace deals he has negotiated.

The White House put out the following statement explaining why the President was rightfully nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize:
_“Today, President Donald J. Trump was nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize for his leadership in brokering the Abraham Accords, bringing about the full normalization of relations between Israel and the United Arab Emirates and marking a major step toward a more peaceful Middle East. This historic diplomatic breakthrough between Israel and the United Arab Emirates is the most significant step toward peace in the Middle East in more than a quarter of a century._

_“This nomination comes amid widespread international support for the peace accords and optimism that the region finally may be turning a corner. By uniting two of America’s closest partners in the region—something many said could not be done—this agreement will create a more peaceful, secure, and prosperous Middle East._

_“This peace deal is a testament to the bold diplomacy and vision of President Trump, and he is honored to be considered by the Nobel Committee. President Trump will host the Israeli and Emirati delegations for a signing ceremony of the Abraham Accords on September 15 at the White House.”_
|

clean_body: Today, our nation came together to remember those that lost their lives on September 11th, 2001. Each year we pledge to never forget the nearly 3,000 innocent Americans who lost their lives during the attacks. From those on-board the four airplanes, to the first responders rushing in to save as many innocent people as they could, to those still dealing with the after-effects of the attack today -- we promise, as a nation, that we will never forget what happened on that day. The deadly attacks on innocent civilians showed us the worst that humanity has to offer, but in the aftermath a clear picture was painted of what makes America the greatest nation on earth. Americans of all races, religions and creeds came together with the common goals of helping those affected by the horrible tragedy and holding the terrorist organizations responsible accountable. Proving to all of those who wish to do us harm, when you knock us down, we will get back up and we will fight back with a vengeance. To those who lost their lives, we will never forget you. To those who lost loved ones, we continue to stand with you. To those who are still struggling, you are not alone. We will NEVER FORGET. | | While the discussion of reopening schools for in-person learning is getting plenty of attention, the topic of what subjects should and shouldn’t be covered upon reopening isn’t receiving nearly as much coverage. | This past week Democrats shamefully weaponized their propaganda network (aka the Mainstream Media) to attack the President. Falsely claiming that, according to “anonymous sources,” he had shown disrespect and contempt for those that serve our country honorably. They even went so far as to exploit the injury, pain and suffering of some of our brave service members, asking what the President would say to them... But, one wounded veteran immediately challenged their exploitative propaganda, exposing their outright lies. Who would have thought that Democrats would be the ones using wounded veterans for votes this election? | Democrats absolutely lost their minds earlier this week (as if they hadn’t already...) when President Donald J. Trump was officially nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize. Despite having cheered on former-President Barack Obama receiving one for doing absolutely nothing, Democrats refuse to admit that President Trump is certainly deserving of the prize for the numerous historic peace deals he has negotiated. The White House put out the following statement explaining why the President was rightfully nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize: “Today, President Donald J. Trump was nominated for the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize for his leadership in brokering the Abraham Accords, bringing about the full normalization of relations between Israel and the United Arab Emirates and marking a major step toward a more peaceful Middle East. This historic diplomatic breakthrough between Israel and the United Arab Emirates is the most significant step toward peace in the Middle East in more than a quarter of a century. “This nomination comes amid widespread international support for the peace accords and optimism that the region finally may be turning a corner. By uniting two of America’s closest partners in the region—something many said could not be done—this agreement will create a more peaceful, secure, and prosperous Middle East. “This peace deal is a testament to the bold diplomacy and vision of President Trump, and he is honored to be considered by the Nobel Committee. President Trump will host the Israeli and Emirati delegations for a signing ceremony of the Abraham Accords on September 15 at the White House.” | The owner of the salon at the center of the controversy surrounding House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s August hair treatment says her salon has officially gone under. | Earlier this month, TPPCF Chairman that the Biden-Harris ticket’s new strategy for winning in 2020 was undoubtedly going to backfire. She wrote a column explaining why their strategy of threatening continued violence was not only bad for our country, but a terrible move politically. And, per usual, Jenny Beth was right... | The ABC daytime show “The View” is a bastion of hypocrisy, former White House press secretary Sarah Sanders said Tuesday after a combative appearance on the show. | |

name: Matt Mowers
subject: What I learned from 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
We emerged from that fateful September day stronger and more unified than ever before. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8e067a4bafbf4d2f96ff27bcd3bb8ae4&_e=YvwZOBHomv2KOyJdZ0rP5uC9k8oHTOiDfa0VUw8VD7OL6FDsxt0DJMZ_Fvk32FNouECAB06ncJ2brJSRZJUFqiB8iq45Fi6GhUVlOsPf24KDvuD4osijG__bnDaskNJZVYerhp2XXcCbGkjaX559oZFeVDnXDTi9BSJir0ch_2XCRgBhb2yOeUBZPlax2aSqh36wwPKOLToEjWO49FKLO4glsTBOfR8DXPu8XGPG3d9RJcA3d4R2idQ08tCu9FzgvKsev8WyOvJBE8GswHsVnQ1wxURpn9m1mVLdJbVYAYM_vRS1mIJVOl0qvhJbgrhzCBI046pNLeyS-J1x45fcGL902GmbDRmxzqZ8BUjNmo8drlk4BOvLCx-rw4S-VUHaDnh9pXHOaYIt1H9rXtTMKMUSrImCV8j04HZ2TVsxrA-HXlFVCwBQqSgkIOptVbkcTUWzRkcGg-n59LslovzIiQt7H6ddf5-3AoJPDwkjN25cHIG3DIiKsUhkIErmMLgg)
|
---
Friend,

Nineteen years ago, our nation was put to the test.

On a clear Tuesday morning, members of the terrorist group al-Qaeda hijacked passenger airplanes and flew them into the World Trade Center and the Pentagon. It was the deadliest terror attack in history, killing nearly 3,000 people and injuring 25,000 more.

**That tragedy brought everyone in our country together.**
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8e067a4bafbf4d2f96ff27bcd3bb8ae4&_e=YvwZOBHomv2KOyJdZ0rP5uC9k8oHTOiDfa0VUw8VD7OL6FDsxt0DJMZ_Fvk32FNouECAB06ncJ2brJSRZJUFqiB8iq45Fi6GhUVlOsPf24KDvuD4osijG__bnDaskNJZVYerhp2XXcCbGkjaX559oZFeVDnXDTi9BSJir0ch_2XCRgBhb2yOeUBZPlax2aSqh36wwPKOLToEjWO49FKLO4glsTBOfR8DXPu8XGPG3d9RJcA3d4R2idQ08tCu9FzgvKsev8WyOvJBE8GswHsVnQ1wxURpn9m1mVLdJbVYAYMYXLt6bW9l3XprfgH2NIzKN_N2V9oyRtuHymHEXrRLHwOOyYmZ9QEum9Gg5Ht5j99nJL6mEX7zHo81RIBp-wAecc6RTLyEz4U096S8dnx9CrDMhBy7flxMBSFjPsR1SsXrpHf_QsfbuBEF-OfYVTgWewH_SsViBQTRj-7493NqJhEBeuBoM4qcyZApydwWg4QVtzkd6f_KClNBj4AZsod4)
|
---
**Today, on the anniversary of that fateful September day, we must put our differences aside and focus on what links all of us together.**

I want to remind folks that it’s our unbreakable American spirit that makes our nation great. But I can’t do it without your help, friend.

**[Click here to share our post remembering those we lost on September 11th -->](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8e067a4bafbf4d2f96ff27bcd3bb8ae4&_e=YvwZOBHomv2KOyJdZ0rP5uC9k8oHTOiDfa0VUw8VD7OL6FDsxt0DJMZ_Fvk32FNouECAB06ncJ2brJSRZJUFqiB8iq45Fi6GhUVlOsPf24KDvuD4osijG__bnDaskNJZVYerhp2XXcCbGkjaX559oZFeVDnXDTi9BSJir0ch_2XCRgBhb2yOeUBZPlax2aSqh36wwPKOLToEjWO49FKLO4glsTBOfR8DXPu8XGPG3d9RJcA3d4R2idQ08tCu9FzgvKsev8WyOvJBE8GswHsVnQ1wxURpn9m1mVLdJbVYAYOnyJrXVofZhxWogPKMblaifQTIPlMJDJKKPW9yylErXVZPFJjc-RIWP9Mo21Focx5sk0Tm8f7WSPawS0MzLGxKFUkVLy4fdWuhFtC23kQzmwCt9il6kX_1oz60wjwXsxPh1MfUYZULYzc6HWtQNYbFmZuZncn09Zxt4nB5oM-3V6tC8_80PBFGx9N7N2vrNjsC7OJb_HJariVR_3zcAihZ)**
|
---
[**SHARE THE POST**](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=8e067a4bafbf4d2f96ff27bcd3bb8ae4&_e=YvwZOBHomv2KOyJdZ0rP5uC9k8oHTOiDfa0VUw8VD7OL6FDsxt0DJMZ_Fvk32FNouECAB06ncJ2brJSRZJUFqiB8iq45Fi6GhUVlOsPf24KDvuD4osijG__bnDaskNJZVYerhp2XXcCbGkjaX559oZFeVDnXDTi9BSJir0ch_2XCRgBhb2yOeUBZPlax2aSqh36wwPKOLToEjWO49FKLO4glsTBOfR8DXPu8XGPG3d9RJcA3d4R2idQ08tCu9FzgvKsev8WyOvJBE8GswHsVnQ1wxURpn9m1mVLdJbVYAYNLaidjpw_ruaI2OQLRBHoif8o1KhKni7NxuHlyknWH2bChMkjXCOq9tjqwpZorn_QhgDffQQz5TNYzd4cdKqIuAC0nYNben4X22d85ZoRTobQ4yA6HMde2d0wSxaNhEhI4G7_wAZghT2jEO0BD9CcTnoPDnQVczTikDjak7dRUpOT0h4slFhjRRzqx0FRifXrCl0ldtSyYAxk6_A5rKOTI)

When America gets hit, we come back stronger for it. Let’s not forget that.

\- Matt

subject: Never Forget
body:
| | | |

| Friends,

Today, let’s remember the lives that were lost, highlight the courage that was shown, and honor the sacrifices that were made.

Our nation is a great nation. And we must remember that in times of crisis, we are one people and we must stand united.

Sincerely,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Darin LaHood
subject: September 11th, 19 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
an entire generation of Americans who weren’t alive to witness 9/11 are now entering adulthood – and we must hold onto our promise to “never forget” | |
---
|
---
Friend,

We can never afford to forget the lives we lost and the heroes who stepped up in the face of terror on September 11th, 2001.

Even 19 years later, the images are as poignant today as they were when we first saw them on that morning, and the loss of 2,977 innocent civilians, firefighters, police officers, and paramedics is as tragic today as it was in the moment we lost them.

**Today, we have an entire generation of Americans entering adulthood who weren’t alive to witness the tragic events of September 11th.**

We all promised that day to “never forget” what we saw and what we felt – and now it is more important than ever to hold onto that promise by educating the next generation in any way we can.

God Bless America.

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

---

subject: Adair Boroughs Needs Us in these Final 50 Days
body:
She is the woman who just outraised her opponent, incumbent Representative Joe Wilson by a longshot. | | | |
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=f9b4834fb4&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
|
---
| | | Friend,

Do you know about Adair Boroughs? She’s an accomplished lawyer, a congressional candidate in South Carolina’s second district and a devoted mother of two. She’s also the woman who just [outraised](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=9f95170c7f&e=3f151f8b74) her opponent, incumbent Representative Joe Wilson by a longshot. Adair has a history of standing up against injustice and supporting hard-working, low-income families. She worked on a number of cases including _United States v. Dylann Roof_ , where the defendant was convicted of killing nine African-Americans during a prayer meeting at the historic Charleston Emanuel AME church and helped to launch Charleston Legal Access, a nonprofit law firm that provides affordable legal services to those who don’t qualify for free legal services but cannot afford the high cost of private attorneys. We all know the election is drawing nearer and nearer. Moms in Office is fighting harder than ever to put Adair and other mothers like her where they belong: Our nation’s capital. But first, we need your help. Today, we humbly ask that you give what you’re able to ensure we can celebrate in November. Every little bit, even [$3 helps](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=47f2198a87&e=3f151f8b74)! Thanks for everything,
### Moms In Office

Friend,

_I’ll never forget where I was, who I was with, or what I was doing on this day nineteen years ago. _

The horrific terrorist attacks — the worst in our history — that took the lives of nearly 3,000 Americans are seared into the mind of every single one of us. The pure evil we witnessed that day disturbed us to our core and caused immeasurable amounts of pain and sadness.

But the tragedy isn’t the only part of that day that sticks with me.

The bravery, courage, and determination of our first responders — law enforcement, firefighters, EMTs, frontline medical personnel, and more — displayed the best of what Americans have to offer.

I always think about the first responders on 9/11, and the incredibly brave members of our military who deployed to the Middle East to seek justice for the victims and their families.

**In response to the unimaginable tragedy of 9/11, we persevered, came together, and showed the world that our country’s backbone is made out of pure steel. **

I encourage you to join me today and reflect on both the horror of that day and the courage of those who rose to answer the call in the face of immense danger.

Unfortunately, the tragedy did not end on September 11, 2001.

There are still first responders, members of our military, and victims who are affected by the horror that unfolded on that day. If you want to make a difference in their lives and help them recover, I encourage you to donate to one of the charities working to help them heal.

You can find a list of them here: **[https://www.charitynavigator.org/index.cfm?bay=content.view&cpid;=490](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=41ef60a9b5eb482cb3b9b59e00f81697&_e=TEoj5OhkisJdMU37h_MK-PL4CTvOOtuK2WWz93LY7bnK4C3DhRMB_yO57Csy6-6ZvI5nAJsvhu6EbDNjCZbjCS6Pye2wSiacHrnyxg-XD-5aOaYZ_xUvmQoP3YARK1apIiI5leCvumW5sRqLtuZATtR7b1z575EJOJ2PgpjJvIiZFKGRgk11BQKp1Rk9ePzSX3dbmueJb4RvbDFESOuXKtaVvlLGaqJ6DloV1wSwTdQFm2Snbx2u_jNmiTy0oZzMtpvRQdtEX6v6KKGgf-T0DTGXmOqPT-BJjeu1AwK53orqMmBTYalTmKUYgXP4sAV27-4nNbJ49uIszH-BjlH2Bp6fWHmeitW_jS7a8HqwbpqN1bFfNALYe-EKJ2B7v_NcRRTQu3cit5CNUjQLcNoxe4zAkne9bQQaxuzH225WAcBudyotR8-_isLhdmpjy_exG7J-MQK-ixzLCsxxgAj5pNAF9mWrscoVg1Iv_AKqz0HMlMm-5DnZpzYWX0SupoNv)**

We must never forget the tragedy that occurred 19 years ago today, and strive to ensure it never happens again.

Thank you for reading.

Sincerely,
Nancy Mace

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Never Again
body:
Nineteen years ago today, an act of unfathomable malice and cruelty mutilated New York City and the Pentagon
| | |
Patriot,

Nineteen years ago today, an act of unfathomable malice and cruelty mutilated New York City and the Pentagon.

The scale of mayhem and death unleashed on America is difficult to comprehend. Nearly 3,000 people were killed, and another 25,000 injured, in four planes, in several buildings and in Shanksville, Pennsylvania—not all of them Americans.

Among the dead were husbands and wives; mothers and fathers; children and grandparents—from every race, religion and gender, and from over ninety countries.

Over a thousand people developed cancer from exposure to the ruins of the Twin Towers. Ten billion dollars’ worth of damage was done to infrastructure and property.

Three hundred and forty-three firefighters, seventy-two law enforcement officers and fifty-five military personnel died.

As we sat, slack-jawed in horror, glued to our television screens, we knew we were witnessing a calamity that would change the world forever, committed by a savage ideology that hates us and plots our destruction.

And yet, nearly twenty years on, America is still learning the lessons from this barbarism.

The voters of Minnesota not only tolerate but have re-nominated a Congresswoman who laughingly dismissed 9/11 with the words, "Some people did some thing." Rep. Ilhan Omar may have contempt for America and the ideals that yoke us together, but the rest of us see each September 11 as an opportunity to reflect on the loss of life, to pay tribute to the service and sacrifice of those firefighters, police officers and Pentagon employees, and to remind ourselves of what’s truly great about these United States.

I was propelled into public life when I walked into a 9/11 memorial service, as a young student at Barry University in Florida, and was handed a crib sheet telling me that I should repeat "allahu akbar" at regular intervals throughout a sermon conducted by an imam from a Terror-tied mosque.

It was the most offensive and tone-deaf instance of woke liberal pandering I’ve ever experienced.

It made me realize how much work we have left to do.

Democrat America’s answer to Islamic terror is pacification and even embrace.

But I have a different vision for our country. One in which we don’t indulge monsters, but instead come together under a shared set of ideas, dedicated to liberty, mutual respect and democracy.

Only by insisting on these common values can we guarantee the continued success of our great nation.

There still are people out there today suffering from disease and alone, without their husbands, wives or children. Our hearts go out to these 9/11 families today as we pray for their comfort and their peace.

We will never forget. God bless America.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Remembering 9/11, Spotlight on candidate Heidi Campbell, & TNDP Veterans Speak Out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Newsletter%20Header%20%283%29.png]
Dear Peter,

Tennessee Republicans aren’t interested in doing the hard work of governance. They abuse the tools of democracy not to Perfect our Union but to benefit themselves. It’s why they called a special legislative session to attack the 1st Amendment [https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2020/08/13/tennessee-camping-felony-capitol/] . It’s why these use government contracts to send kickbacks to their companies [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/newschannel-5-investigates/tennessee-goes-on-80-million-no-bid-spending-spree-for-covid-19-supplies] .

There's only one solution: we have to send the GOP packing. And we have the right candidates do it. Meet Heidi Campbell, Mayor of Oak Hill and your next senator for State Senate District 20.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Heidi%202a.jpg]
With an MBA from Vanderbilt's Owen School of Business, Heidi has the experience to be fiscally responsible and guide our state through this economic downturn. She's a savvy businesswoman who ascended to become an executive in the music industry. As Mayor of Oak Hill, she balanced every single budget - even adding $1.6 million to city reserves.

Money is tight for everyone. We need to do more with less. As a State Senator, Heidi Campbell will make the tough decisions necessary to keep our state running efficiently and effectively.

We get why the GOP is panicking right now. We would be, too, if we had to campaign against candidates like Heidi. She, along with our slate of strong women candidates [https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/] - led by Marquita Bradshaw at the top of the ticket [https://www.marquitabradshaw.com] - are going to give Tennessee Republicans a run for their money.

Election day is November 3rd and early voting starts October 14th. It's up to you to help change things so remember to mask up and make a plan to VOTE EARLY DURING EARLY VOTING .

See you at the polls,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

PS - Heidi is asking you to join her in this campaign. Whether it's your time, energy, or resources, all are essential to make sure she wins in District 18. Join her campaign now. [https://www.campbell20.com/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/9%3A11%20memorial.jpg]

19 YEARS LATER, NEVER FORGET
"19 years later, the agonizing pain of that fateful day still reverberates. We refuse to forget the collective pain we all felt and we know the world joins us in honoring the thousands who lost their lives, the brave first responders who ran headfirst into unimaginable danger, and the families and communities who sacrificed so much.

Nearly two decades later, we can also see that out of the ashes left behind on that awful day, we did what America does when we are at our best - we stood united in the face of a common enemy. We comforted those in need and then made sure that love and resilience drowned out hatred and fear. The ultimate message we sent out into the world during the last 19 years - the best of times and the worst of times - is that no enemy from within or without who can destroy the promise and ideals on which this country was built. We will never forget." - Mary Mancini, Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

GOVERNOR LEE'S SECRET NO BID CONTRACTS
The Tennessee Emergency Management Agency has gone on an $80 million spending spree on no-bid contracts. Crucial health product contracts for masks have been doled out to companies with political connections. [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/newschannel-5-investigates/tennessee-gov-bill-lee-plans-to-continue-no-bid-covid-spending]

During this public health crisis, securing personal protective equipment (PPE) at low prices through competitive bidding is crucial- it saves us money when the budget is tight. Unfortunately, Governor Bill Lee and Tenenssee Republicans used a secretive no-bid contracting process to purchase this much needed equipment.

How bad is it? The furniture company owned by Republican state Rep. Jerry Sexton was awarded a no-bid contract to make hospital gowns for the state for $165,000. According to investigative reporter Phil Williams, "Sexton's price per gown -- $5.50 -- was almost double the price charged by other vendors." [https://www.newschannel5.com/news/newschannel-5-investigates/tennessee-goes-on-80-million-no-bid-spending-spree-for-covid-19-supplies]

This complete lack or transparency is not new for Gov. Lee. Remember the time in February when he awarded "a no-bid, over-the-budget contract to an outside vendor for the implementation of school vouchers?" [https://wpln.org/post/gov-lee-defends-school-voucher-no-bid-contract-says-he-cares-more-about-kids-than-about-process/]

More to come...
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/veteran%20household%20final.png]

HONORING OUR VETERANS
Last week, Donald Trump showed us his true colors [http://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2020/09/trump-americans-who-died-at-war-are-losers-and-suckers/615997/] . He has no respect for the men and women who serve our country. In response to President Trump’s comments about military service, the Tennessee Democratic Party Veterans and Military Families Caucus chairs issued the following powerful statement that we just had to share:

Read our Veterans and Military Families Statement. [https://tndp.org/10423-2/]

MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE EARLY DURING EARLY VOTING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Early%20Voting%20Donkey600w.png]
Early voting is easy, safe and quick and the best solution to avoid crowded polling locations and Covid-19 risks. Make your plan to wear a mask, go during non-peak hours if possible, and maintain social distancing.

Early voting times and locations differ in each county. Check your county election commission for all times and locations.

TNDP THREE STAR CELEBRATION FRIDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2020
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Three%20Star%20Logo%20600w.png]
Early next month, the Tennessee Democratic Party will hold our largest fundraiser of the year - virtually, of course - to help us continue our work to elect more Democrats in the state.
We're so excited about our keynote speaker and can't wait to make the announcement. Stay tuned!

TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-09-11%20at%2011.42.02%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-09-11%20at%2011.43.04%20AM.png]

PLEASE CONSIDER MAKING A DONATION RIGHT NOW
We now have less than two months to get out the vote in Tennessee. The TNDP is spending all of our resources making sure that folks are registered to vote, know how to vote, and can do it safely - but we need your help. Please donate so we can help elect Joe Biden, Marquita Bradshaw, and other Democratic leaders who will give our veterans and military families the respect they deserve..
Will you make a donation right now, and help us pay for the media strategy needed to flip these crucial seats? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Patriot Day
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=193A452A20A1844)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | "The courage, heroism, and resilience Americans displayed on 9/11, and in its aftermath, are perpetual testaments to the spirit of our country. While our Nation was anguished by this attack, the grit displayed that day — the very essence of America — was a reminder that our citizens have never failed to rise to the occasion. Heroes sprang into action in the face of great peril to help save their fellow Americans. Many laid down their lives. As we reflect on the events of that September morning, let us recommit to embrace the stalwart bravery displayed and reaffirm our dedication to defending liberty from all who wish to deny it."
\- Presidential Proclamation on Patriot Day, 2020

On this Patriot Day, let us remember the resilience of the American spirit shown as we unified as a nation after the attacks that occured 19 years ago today. There is no limit to what American citizens can do when we stand together to fight for the cause of freedom for our nation and around the world.

Never forget what happened. Never forget we fought back.
May God bless our brave heroes and God bless America,
Catherine Engelbrecht

---
| |
---
|
---

---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=193A452A20A1847)
---

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: He knew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f6f/7f51f7bc/42aeb996/4efa2814/287700068/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | This is horrifying, Peter. The recently released recording of President Trump admitting he knew COVID-19 was going to be devastating confirms what we suspected: **Our elected officials played down the worst pandemic in generations, from the VERY BEGINNING -- even though they knew better.**

They knew that COVID-19 would be far worse than the flu, and that it was airborne and therefore easier to spread. Instead of taking the urgently-needed steps to limit the death toll -- they played down the virus' danger.

Sen. Cornyn sits on the Senate Intelligence committee, and he knew starting in February just how dangerous this would be. Instead of preparing the American people, **he told us not to worry, made jokes on Twitter, spread misinformation, took a long weekend, and more.** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f6f/7f51f7bc/42aeb996/4efa280b/287700068/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200911.2nd__2098__&amount=10")
---
**He knew, and he failed us.**
[ELECT A REAL LEADER](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f6f/7f51f7bc/42aeb996/4efa280b/287700068/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200911.2nd__2098__&amount=10")
---
Sen. Cornyn spent crucial days and weeks downplaying the virus. Now, more than 190,000 Americans have died from COVID-19.

When a real leader sees a problem like this on the horizon, they take action. They don't make jokes, test the political winds, or fall in line with their Washington bosses.

When MJ sees a problem she doesn't act like nothing is wrong. She doesn't take a break and let others do her fighting for her. She identifies solutions, buckles down, and completes the mission. **Donate to elect a real leader:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Today Is A Day We Remember Unlike Any Other
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
On September 11th 2001, our country experienced one of the saddest events in American history. Our hearts remain with the victims, family members, first responders and others who were affected by the tragedies in New York, Virginia, and Pennsylvania. Even though our spirits were broken on that day, Americans from all walks of life came together to comfort one another, demonstrating our resilience as a people and as a nation.

Today, I hope you can take a moment to honor and remember those lost 19 years ago and also remember that as Americans we have faced seemingly insurmountable challenges, but our commitment to one another and our values as Americans have always helped us triumph.

Sincerely,

-- Greg

------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
------------------------------------------

4340 E Indian School Rd.

Our hearts remain with the victims, family members, first responders and others who were affected by the tragedies in New York, Virginia, and Pennsylvania. Even though our spirits were broken on that day, Americans from all walks of life came together to comfort one another, demonstrating our resilience as a people and as a nation. Today, I hope you can take a moment to honor and remember those lost 19 years ago and also remember that as Americans we have faced seemingly insurmountable challenges, but our commitment to one another and our values as Americans have always helped us triumph. Sincerely, -- Greg | Paid for by Stanton for Congress | Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

subject: We need 5,000 donors by Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
With 53 days left to beat back the far-left, we need to continue building momentum to take back the House. We need your support today!

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}}) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56255385:W1i1GQKeN:m:1:2247059263:589056A4461AAF17FD569F2735239DE2:r)
---

Peter,

**Democrats see strength in numbers**.

**There is not much else that seems to get through to them**.

I'm going to keep this short:**In order to fuel our fight against the far-left, I've set an ambitious goal of finding 25,000 conservatives to make a contribution to my campaign this month - so far, we've found 7,000.

We need to continue chipping away at this goal, so before midnight this Sunday my campaign needs to find 5,000 additional conservative donors willing to make a contribution. **

**[Will you chip-in right now to help us chip away at our goal?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56255385:W1i1GQKeN:m:1:2247059263:589056A4461AAF17FD569F2735239DE2:r)**

| [ **Help us reach our goal
donate today ➠**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56255385:W1i1GQKeN:m:1:2247059263:589056A4461AAF17FD569F2735239DE2:r)
---

You see, when we file our next fundraising report, the number of donors to my campaign will be made public; **I want to be able to show Democrats that our supporters are more energized than theirs**.

**[So, can I count on you to make a contribution of $10,$25, $50, $75 or even $100 or more before midnight Sunday and help us chip away at our goal of identifying 5,000 additional donors this weekend?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56255385:W1i1GQKeN:m:1:2247059263:589056A4461AAF17FD569F2735239DE2:r)**

Keeping up the fight in defense of our shared conservative values matters, and I'm sincerely thankful to have you on my team.

For Freedom,

Jim Jordan

name: Matt Mayberry for Congress
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTA3OTkxMjM3NDgxNzMxNjU5JmM9aTZlMiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDY3NzE5NTgmZD12MWUxeTVx.aU7_1jeP1VXwNqkMaep_yNPAvgov12uhHZ5UX68fchY)
| | | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTA3OTkxMjM3NDgxNzMxNjU5JmM9aTZlMiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDY3NzE5NjEmZD1yNW00eDlh.mKoF3GtSX4NGI5vYosdzjO6LbRscKtDJkgUuBH683tg)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,

Words can not begin to express my gratitude and appreciation for your help, support and vote in this last Republican primary.

I entered the race because I found four veterans who were going to lose their access to mental healthcare. That was wrong and I became their champion. Eight months later, I exit the race having made hundreds of new friends and an opportunity to speak with thousands of amazing Granite Staters. Campaigns are always physically challenging, but you made it easy. Your kind words, pledges of support and the occasional snacks were always welcomed...especially the snacks!

You gave of your time, talent and treasure and I never took any of it for granted and appreciated it greatly. I received envelopes with a $5 inside stating that the donor couldn’t give much but he wanted to try. I stopped at a woman’s house in Londonderry because she had my name on her front lawn and I hadn’t met her yet. She was surprised and stated “why would you stop just to thank me for a lawn sign?”. That shouldn’t be the exception, it should be the rule.

I would encourage each and every one of you to find a Republican candidate and support them. I, personally, will be working hard to get Governor Chris Sununu re-elected and return the State Senate and State House back into Republican hands. I need your help to do so please.

However, today, and this letter, is about you and I. Thank you for standing by my side. You invited me into your homes and businesses and I invited you into my heart. Words will never thank you enough or appropriately but I can try: Thank you.

I look forward to seeing you. God has a path for each of us and I can only hope that ours cross again in the future. Be well, be safe and be kind to a stranger because that stranger could be an angel sent from God to remind us of our humanity. If I can ever be of help to you and your family please let me know. Thank you. Matt
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress

| Matt Mayberry for Congress

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: This time next week...
body:
you could be voting!
---
| | | | | | Friday, September 11th 2020
---
|
---
| Early Voting: 1 week from today!
---
| Exactly 1 week from today -on Friday, September 18th- early voting begins in Virginia. What does "early voting" mean?
It means that this time next week...you could be voting!
With early voting, you visit your local voter registrar office in person to CAST YOUR VOTE for Scott \- and complete your entire November ballot!
Voting "early" is open to all registered voters.
We encourage you to simply bring your ID and vote in-person, exactly as you would on Election Day... just without the lines!!
Find your local information, like hours and location, here:

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC launches ad in NC-11 against Moe Davis
body:
Moe Davis has No Place in Congress
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 11, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Launches Ad in North Carolina Against Moe Davis
Moe Davis has No Place in Congress
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtI0w8Fj6vdI4kvZFE7cGQTjOF96K-GL1V-_gcCvOTWUnM_rrqwoOZXY2gDth_ej2K24BCRieBkVc_Yimvaccn9QuBhRPE6RPGSgEsmNmWb988i6TykaI0Q_QXJB93IGs5GG7P-Eda3LRdKLp-Jn_aOqMqgYQ67y4xT0zekrrGtRSUbwKMyPX-anhx9I1rzBIzng7i09OQQ=&c=D8WYuuDL4Jphf1WQK2Grqynr_l9vUMbsyHKPx5k3vef45AghthWWBw==&ch=lQNHL5zvajibcLFtFMCgJCc5x0L-dpW3CqBfhqTe5AzX974ppFJ2JA==)
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, announced that they will be running an ad against Moe Davis titled, "No Place." Davis will face Republican Madison Cawthorn in November's election.
The ad, which launches today and will be a six-figure television buy in North Carolina, highlights Moe Davis's appalling, violent tweet.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Viewer discretion is advised on our new ad as it contains violent and graphic language from Moe Davis. We should all be appalled at what Moe Davis said, calling for the murder of people he disagrees with. That language might fly in AOC's district, but it won't fly in North Carolina. We need somebody who will bring our country together. There is no place for Moe Davis in Congress."
The full ad can be viewed [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtI0w8Fj6vdI4kvZFE7cGQTjOF96K-GL1V-_gcCvOTWUnM_rrqwoOZXY2gDth_ej2K24BCRieBkVc_Yimvaccn9QuBhRPE6RPGSgEsmNmWb988i6TykaI0Q_QXJB93IGs5GG7P-Eda3LRdKLp-Jn_aOqMqgYQ67y4xT0zekrrGtRSUbwKMyPX-anhx9I1rzBIzng7i09OQQ=&c=D8WYuuDL4Jphf1WQK2Grqynr_l9vUMbsyHKPx5k3vef45AghthWWBw==&ch=lQNHL5zvajibcLFtFMCgJCc5x0L-dpW3CqBfhqTe5AzX974ppFJ2JA==).
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

While usually I send you a recap of the week that was, on today’s 19th anniversary of the terrorist attacks of 9/11. I wanted to take a moment to reflect and share what this day means to me.

**Nobody will ever forget where they were that terrible day when we first heard the news** —maybe you were at work, at home, or like me, at school. But what we also must never forget is the way our great nation came together in the days, weeks, and months that followed. **In the wake of the most shocking, tragic event in our country’s history, people of all races, creeds, religions, and ideologies put aside all of their differences at once and came together as one united America.**

In the heat of a political campaign, it can be very easy to forget that there is far more we share as a collective people and spirit than anything that could set us apart. That we can come from different backgrounds and walks of life and points of view, but **at the end of the day, we are all vital pieces to the fabric that makes up our vibrant community and larger than that, our vibrant nation.**

While the years pass and naturally, we heal, it is important we take a moment today to remember the fathers and mothers, brothers and sisters, husbands and wives taken from us too soon. **We must never forget the police officers, firefighters, and everyday civilians who gave their lives so others could keep theirs.** And most importantly, we must never forget that there is far more that unites us—ALL of us—than could ever divide us.

**May God bless our brave men and women who gave their lives that day, may God bless their friends and families, and may God bless the United States of America.**

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

body:
http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Today+we+remember...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F0bb46df09996%2Ftoday-we-remember Tweet (http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Today+we+remember...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F0bb46df09996%2Ftoday-we-remember)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=296a859ece&e=f6564bbe3b Forward (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=296a859ece&e=f6564bbe3b)
Today we Remember...
19 years ago our nation was attacked. We mourned those that died, praised and honored those that came to the rescue and came closer and more united as a nation.

Join us tonight at 6p on Newsmax for "Spicer&Co" as we honor some of those heroes from that day. We will be joined by retired Navy Captain Dave Tarantino, Jonathan Stewart and Gerry Kane Retired NYPD Sergeant.

https://youtu.be/UmRB6eWoexo?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193
Former White House Press Secretary discusses the balance of being the first mom serving as White House Press Secretary

Subscribe to my YouTube Channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193)
Highlights from Spicer&Co this week:
* More from Sarah Huckabee Sanders (https://youtu.be/Wzn_naRhh28?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193) on anonymous sources and the media's double standard on COVID reporting
* Boris Epshteyn joins us to discuss all the hit pieces (https://youtu.be/3sJXMpkLn6I?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193) against President Trump in the lead up to the election
* Trish Regan discusses (https://youtu.be/7QSWj7HldIM?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193) the ACLU attacking a university over Nick Sandman's acceptance
* Is the way we talk about wine "sexist" and "racist"? Dave Rubin joins us to discuss. (https://youtu.be/FWI3zg2hJoE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193)
* The NFL is back! But will America watch? Our Company discusses (https://youtu.be/PS_0c2JHB8w?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193)

Coming up next week on Spicer&Co:
* Exclusive one-on-one with the Political Director of the RNC, Chris Carr
* Marc Lotter from the Trump 2020 Campaign
* Congressional Candidate Kim Klacik
* Tom Fitton from Judicial Watch
* The Chair of America First Action SuperPAC Linda McMahon
* Alan Dershowitz

https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism/dp/154605944X?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193

Only One Month Until Leading America

My second book, "Leading America" just went to print and I'm working on reading the audiobook myself now. I'm looking forward to it's release and you all reading it (or listening to it if you're an audiobook person).

I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would really appreciate your support if you could pre-order it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=296a859ece-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_31_05_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-296a859ece-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean
